supply_chain.dependencies: Nuclear fuel supply dependent on long-term contracts with suppliers; reliance on specialized offshore wind installation vessel under construction; dependence on major offshore construction and equipment suppliers for CVOW Commercial Project with contracts denominated in Euros and Danish kroner
risks: Fuel for transportation and installation for CVOW Commercial Project
Ability of key suppliers and contractors to timely satisfy their obligations under existing contracts
Marine wildlife and severe weather events impacting CVOW Commercial Project

Supply chain disruption risks for CVOW Commercial Project including delays in obtaining key materials, labor difficulties, difficulties with partners or potential partners, inflation, impact of applicable tariffs; nuclear fuel supply dependent on worldwide market conditions; specialized equipment and expertise required for offshore wind construction; concentration of data centers primarily in Loudoun County, Virginia requiring significant transmission investments
Impact of applicable tariffs on CVOW Commercial Project costs

regulatory_risks: Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) worker safety requirements
Dodd-Frank Act derivatives regulations including potential mandatory clearing, exchange trading or margin requirements
South Carolina Commission rate regulation
State utility commission regulations on retail electric and gas rates, cost recovery mechanisms, base rate reviews
Potential federal climate change program and state-level GHG emission limitations or efficiency improvement requirements
Virginia legislation on base rate reviews and cost recovery mechanisms
Endangered Species Act (ESA) and Migratory Bird Treaty Act requirements potentially restricting company activities
EPA regulations on water quality (Regulation 316(b), Effluent Limitations Guidelines)
North Carolina Commission rate regulation
Federal Power Act restrictions on DESC dividends
Virginia Clean Economy Act (VCEA) renewable energy portfolio standards
PJM capacity market changes affecting generation resource capacity value calculations
BOEM offshore wind decommissioning financial assurance requirements
Virginia legislation resetting base rate review frequency to biennial period with earnings sharing mechanism
Federal and state laws protecting graves, sacred sites, historic sites and cultural resources

Changes to federal, state and local environmental laws and regulations, including those related to climate change, the tightening of emission or discharge limits for GHGs and other substances, more extensive permitting requirements and the regulation of additional substances
Changes in or interpretations of federal and state tax laws and regulations, including those related to tax credits or other incentives
FERC regulations on wholesale sales and transmission of electricity, market-based rate authority, Standards of Conduct, affiliate restrictions
Price-Anderson Act nuclear liability insurance requirements
Difficulty in anticipating mitigation requirements associated with environmental and other regulatory approvals or related appeals

Risks associated with the operation of nuclear facilities, including costs associated with the disposal of spent nuclear fuel, decommissioning, plant maintenance and changes in existing regulations governing such facilities
EPA regulations including Mercury and Air Toxics Standards, CO2 emissions standards for fossil fuel-fired generating units, fine particulate matter standards, PFAS exposure mitigation
North Carolina and South Carolina cost-of-service rate regulation with potential rate reductions if earnings exceed authorized ROE
NRC nuclear decommissioning financial assurance requirements
Coal combustion residual (CCR) regulations requiring capital expenditures and closure/monitoring of ash ponds and landfills
Changes to regulated electric rates collected by the Companies and regulated gas distribution rates
Clean Water Act discharge permitting requirements
Timing and receipt of regulatory approvals necessary for planned construction or growth projects and compliance with conditions associated with such regulatory approvals
Competition in the development, construction and ownership of certain electric transmission facilities in the Companies' service territory in connection with Order 1000
Changes in rating agency requirements or credit ratings and their effect on availability and cost of capital
NERC mandatory reliability standards with potential fines up to $1.6 million per day per violation
Clean Water Act (CWA) discharge permits, stormwater management, wetlands authorization requirements
Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) provisions including annual fee for waste methane emissions from oil and natural gas industry
FERC transmission rate regulation
EPA regulations on air quality (Ozone Standards, ACE Rule, Carbon Regulations)
Cost of environmental strategy and compliance, including those costs related to climate change
Transportation Security Administration gas sector cyber security directives
EPA regulations on coal combustion residuals (CCR)
DOE spent nuclear fuel disposal obligations
Clean Air Act permitting and compliance requirements
Sarbanes-Oxley Act Section 404 internal control requirements
Virginia Clean Economy Act (VCEA) requirements including 100% zero-carbon generation by 2045, renewable energy portfolio standards, offshore wind and energy storage mandates
15% alternative minimum tax on GAAP net income for corporations in excess of $1 billion under IRA
NRC regulations and requirements for nuclear facility operations including potential for revocation, suspension or modification of operating licenses
Adverse outcomes in litigation matters or regulatory proceedings
Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative (RGGI) participation and withdrawal
Clean Air Act (CAA) permitting and emissions requirements for carbon, methane, VOC, NOX, GHGs, mercury, SO2 and particulate matter
State public utility commission dividend restrictions
Federal, state and local legislative and regulatory developments
IRS safe harbor guidance on treatment of amounts paid to repair, maintain, replace or improve natural gas distribution property
Changes in implementation and enforcement practices of regulators relating to environmental standards and litigation exposure for remedial activities
Risks of operating businesses in regulated industries that are subject to changing regulatory structures
CERCLA and state hazardous waste laws
Pipeline safety laws and regulations from federal and state agencies
Virginia Commission rate regulation and base rate reviews
Changes in rules for RTOs and ISOs including changes in rate designs, changes in FERC's interpretation of market rules and new and evolving capacity models

sanction_risks: Impact of applicable tariffs on CVOW Commercial Project construction costs
